title: Refer, Collect Money
description: Collect at least 10% of the fees wey your friends dey pay. You fit make up to $1,000 every month.

states.error: We no fit load your referrals.

hero.lifetimeLabel: Wetin you don earn so far

code.title: Your invite link
code.subtitle: Share your link or code. Anybody wey sign up with am go connect to you.
code.shareText: Save with USDC and join savings circles for MoolaHub. Use my link take start:
code.editHint: Pick 4 to 15 letters or numbers. Na wetin your friends go type take join through you.
code.confirmTitle: You wan change your referral code?
code.confirmBody: Your old code go stop to work sharp sharp. Anybody wey still get your old link no go count as your referral.

errors.format: Use 4 to 15 letters or numbers, no space.
errors.unchanged: Na your code be that already.

tier.title: Your earning level
tier.subtitle: The more active savers wey you refer, the bigger your share of the fees.
tier.progressToNext: {{count}} more active savers make you reach {{tier}}
tier.maxed: You don reach the top level, the highest {{rate}}% share.

withdraw.title: Comot your earnings
withdraw.subtitle: Move your commission go your wallet.
withdraw.success: Your withdrawal don dey go your wallet.
withdraw.monthly: You don comot {{used}} out of {{cap}} this month

locked.title: Withdrawals go open when you reach {{min}}
locked.needMore: Earn {{amount}} more make you fit withdraw.
locked.monthlyReached: You don reach your {{cap}} limit for this month. E go reset on the 1st.

errors.monthly: This one go pass your {{cap}} monthly limit. You get {{amount}} remain this month.

referrals.title: People wey you refer
referrals.subtitle: Everybody wey you bring come MoolaHub.
referrals.empty: No referral yet. Share your link make you start to earn.

share.title: Send your referral code
share.desc: Share your code or link with friends and family make dem fit join MoolaHub.

save.title: Make dem save
save.desc: When dem sign up and continue to save, you dey collect part of the fees wey dem dey pay. The more dem save, the more you dey earn.

earn.title: Collect your earnings
earn.desc: Keep at least {{rate}}% of those fees, up to $1,000 every month.

limits.note: Withdrawals: minimum {{min}} each time, up to {{max}} every month.

signup.invited: Invite don work. You dey join through friend.
